name: Wolfhouse Booking Assistant - Main - Shared Engine Dry Run

meta.description: Phase 12d dry-run workflow. INACTIVE / NOT IMPORTED into production n8n. Single Staff API orchestrator call: POST /staff/bot/booking-dry-run (gate + quote + availability + add-on preview in one plan). Path: Set dry_run flags -> IF guard -> parse guest payload -> HTTP booking-dry-run -> map reply_draft/planned_actions/safety flags -> respond (debug only). X-Luna-Bot-Token via n8n Header Auth credential Luna Bot Internal Token (staging) — bind at import, never hardcoded. No graph.facebook.com. No api.stripe.com. No booking-create. No payment-link. No webhook. No live WhatsApp send.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "error": "dry_run_guard_blocked", "detail": "dry_run is not true; refusing booking-dry-run path", "whatsapp_sent": false, "sends_whatsapp": false, "calls_n8n": false }

parameters.jsCode:
// Phase 12d — preserve Staff API dry-run plan fields (no WhatsApp send)
const api = $input.first().json;

return [{
  json: {
    dry_run: api.dry_run !== false,
    preview_only: api.preview_only !== false,
    no_write_performed: api.no_write_performed !== false,
    creates_booking: api.creates_booking === true,
    creates_payment: api.creates_payment === true,
    creates_stripe_link: api.creates_stripe_link === true,
    sends_whatsapp: false,
    calls_n8n: api.calls_n8n === true,
    planned_actions: api.planned_actions || [],
    reply_draft: api.reply_draft || '',
    next_action: api.next_action || null,
    gate: api.gate || {},
    booking_preview: api.booking_preview || {},
    availability: api.availability || {},
    addon_preview: api.addon_preview || {},
    success: api.success !== false,
    whatsapp_sent: false,
    live_send_blocked: true,
    staff_api_endpoint: '/staff/bot/booking-dry-run',
    note: 'Phase 12d: single Staff API orchestrator. reply_draft is NOT sent to guest.'
  }
}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ dry_run: $json.dry_run, preview_only: $json.preview_only, no_write_performed: $json.no_write_performed, creates_booking: $json.creates_booking, creates_payment: $json.creates_payment, creates_stripe_link: $json.creates_stripe_link, sends_whatsapp: $json.sends_whatsapp, calls_n8n: $json.calls_n8n, planned_actions: $json.planned_actions, reply_draft: $json.reply_draft, next_action: $json.next_action, gate: $json.gate, booking_preview: $json.booking_preview, availability: $json.availability, addon_preview: $json.addon_preview, whatsapp_sent: false, live_send_blocked: true, staff_api_endpoint: $json.staff_api_endpoint, note: $json.note }) }}
